context: Tests whether the agent detects CRDs by API group, uses detect_crd_wrapper.sh or similar parsing, documents CRD lookup workflow, and explains finding specifications for validation.

checklist.name: CRD identification
checklist.description: Guide explains that CRDs are identified by non-standard apiVersion groups (e.g., cert-manager.io)

checklist.name: Detection script
checklist.description: Script parses YAML to extract apiVersion and kind from each resource

checklist.name: Multi-document parsing
checklist.description: Script handles multiple YAML documents separated by ---

checklist.name: Correct CRD identified
checklist.description: Script output identifies Certificate as a CRD (cert-manager.io/v1)

checklist.name: Standard resource distinguished
checklist.description: Script or guide distinguishes Service (standard) from Certificate (CRD)

checklist.name: Documentation lookup
checklist.description: Guide mentions querying documentation or specs when CRD schemas unavailable

checklist.name: Required fields check
checklist.description: Guide explains checking CRD required fields (e.g., secretName, issuerRef for Certificate)

checklist.name: Version included
checklist.description: Detection output includes full apiVersion (not just group) for accurate schema lookup

checklist.name: Structured output
checklist.description: Script outputs results in structured format (JSON, table, or clear key-value pairs)

checklist.name: Schema fallback
checklist.description: Guide mentions fallback strategies when CRD schema not found by kubeconform
